findings.md.title: 5-HT2A/2B/2C Gq-Coupling Panel: Findings
findings.md.tagline: TM6 swings out with Gq bound, every time — 6/6 receptor-ligand pairs, reproduced across three distinct serotonin receptors.
findings.md.why: Why it matters: a confidence score tells you what Boltz predicted, not whether it reproduces real GPCR biology. It is useful for: anyone checking whether a Boltz-2 campaign's structural predictions actually track the textbook activation mechanism (TM6 outward swing on G-protein coupling) before trusting downstream affinity or selectivity calls.
